cd ui/src/i18n/locales && python3 -c "
import re
with open('fr.ts') as f:
    content = f.read()
# Find all values that are purely ASCII English (no accented chars, no French markers)
pairs = re.findall(r':\s*\"([^\"]+)\"', content)
english = []
for p in pairs:
    if len(p) > 3 and not any(c in p for c in 'éèêëàâùûüôîïç'):
        # check if it looks like English (starts with uppercase or is a common English word)
        if p[0].isupper() or p.lower() in ('never', 'no', 'yes', 'ok', 'none', 'na', 'on', 'off', 'full', 'stream', 'missing', 'no accounts', 'not configured', 'setup guide', 'run now', 'preview', 'preview rendered markdown', 'will create on save', 'live draft preview', 'saved preview', 'content', 'lines', 'for details', 'no events yet', 'deny', 'host', 'agent', 'session', 'cwd', 'resolved', 'security', 'ask', 'severity', 'plugin', 'connected', 'channel', 'built-in', 'no agents', 'copy id', 'copy agent id to clipboard', 'already the default agent', 'set as the default agent', 'select an agent', 'pick an agent to inspect its workspace and tools', 'agent context', 'workspace', 'primary model', 'identity name', 'identity avatar', 'skills filter', 'workspace, identity, and model configuration', 'workspace and scheduling targets', 'last refresh', 'load channels to see live status', 'no channels found', 'scheduler', 'gateway cron status', 'agent cron jobs', 'scheduled jobs targeting this agent', 'no jobs assigned', 'empty draft', 'markdown preview', 'expand preview', 'collapse preview', 'edit file', 'close preview', 'core files', 'bootstrap persona, identity, and tool guidance', 'select a file to edit', 'not created yet', 'updated unknown', 'this file is missing', 'no files found', 'no agents found', 'no agents configured', 'security audit', 'no critical issues', 'last heartbeat', 'for details', 'manual rpc', 'send a raw gateway method with json params', 'select a method', 'params', 'catalog from models.list', 'no events yet', 'browser enabled', 'tool profile', 'deny', 'host', 'agent', 'session', 'cwd', 'resolved', 'security', 'ask', 'severity', 'plugin'):
            english.append(p)
for e in english:
    print(e)
"
